## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Update to an existing skill

## Skill(s) affected

<!-- e.g. performance, code-review — or N/A -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter `name` matches the skill directory name (if editing a skill)
- [ ] `version` bumped in skill frontmatter (if editing a skill)
- [ ] README Skill Index updated (if adding or changing a skill description)
- [ ] `node scripts/validate-skills.mjs` passes locally
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing)
